relatedBlades.title: The CXO's guide to superior application performance and UX
relatedBlades.subtitle: Why application performance can make — or break — your business
relatedBlades.copy:
It's no secret that customer retention and business growth depend on a good user experience. Customers want reliable, secure results from web and mobile applications, expect fast load times even during peak traffic periods, and are quick to abandon online purchases and experiences in the face of outages or attacks.

But guaranteeing a smooth user experience represents an ever-shifting target — as sprawling cloud environments, sluggish networks, and evolving cyber attacks threaten to degrade application performance.

In our ebook, The CXO's guide to superior application performance and UX, see why…

- Traditional application solutions fail to meet modern performance standards
- Cyber attacks and sluggish performance take a toll on business growth
- A connectivity cloud can help boost application availability and a seamless UX

![The CXO's guide to superior application performance and UX - Ebook Image](//cf-assets.www.cloudflare.com/slt3lc6tev37/7x8qkLcuR8EtZmWEwAPlJV/9c9ca3004a5ab0b8cd330415169d815e/CXO-ebook-Thumbnail.png)
